query:
-- Verificar empresa Baggio
SELECT id, name FROM companies WHERE name LIKE '%BAGGIO%' OR name LIKE '%B I IMOVEIS%';

-- Verificar usuários e suas empresas
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.companyId, c.name as companyName
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN companies c ON u.companyId = c.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Camila%' OR u.name LIKE '%Carolina%' OR u.name LIKE '%Darlan%' OR u.name LIKE '%Lucas%';
